title: Not safe for tourists - Mission District, San Francisco ...
content: Horrible place. Dirty, dangerous, not nice. Skip this place on your trip to San Francisco, really not nice. Date of experience: April 2023.

title: MISSION PLAYGROUND - Updated June 2026
content: Quite a fun playground that's hiding behind main streets like Valencia. My kid had a lot of fun here. There's soccer field and tennis courts too!

title: 2026 Mission District, San Francisco Travel Guide
content: + Learn more about One Key. Hotels in Mission DistrictFlights to San FranciscoThings to do in San FranciscoCar Rentals in Mission DistrictMission District Vacations. ## San Francisco. A vibrant mural on a building, depicting a large figure with a heart-shaped halo, surrounded by various characters in colorful attire. A busy street with a colorful building, a traffic light, and pedestrians. A colorful mural on a building, a narrow street with pedestrians, and houses with vibrant facades. A street lined with trees and buildings, including a mural and a sign for 'PIZZA COFFEE'. Visit this San Francisco neighborhood brimming with culture, history, a lively art scene, buzzing nightlife and some of the city’s best burritos. From its global dining scene to San Francisco’s oldest structure, with dynamic live music venues and the city’s oldest theater, the Mission District enticingly blends old and new. Visit the Mission District to experience an authentic slice of life by the bay, from Valencia Street’s boutiques to Dolores Park’s wide lawns.
